scripts.check: pnpm exec biome check src/routes src/router.tsx src/styles src/utils src/vite-env.d.ts vite.config.ts package.json tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit
scripts.format: pnpm exec biome check --write src/routes src/router.tsx src/styles src/utils src/vite-env.d.ts vite.config.ts package.json tsconfig.json
